delegations.scope: Harbor Runtime API endpoint and fixture tests
delegations.result: integrated and read back by the main controller

forbidden_targets: cookies, credentials, verification codes, profile storage, DOM, or raw evidence
ownership_constraints.shared_carrier_policy: The main controller exclusively owns the HARBOR-241 Loom carriers.

non_goals: cookies, credentials, verification codes, profile storage, DOM, or raw evidence

validation.live_evidence: not_run; implementation has not been merged and App does not yet expose the user-confirmation intent

safety_boundary: User confirmation only; no Cookie, DOM, credential, profile storage, or external-site write access.
